title: offer_shortlist
description: Frozen contract for the deterministic offer shortlist emitted by scripts/offers/gmj_merge_shortlists.py (SCOUT-02/SCOUT-04). Local URN $id only (never a fetchable URL — SSRF precedent). The entry pins exactly four contract keys (canonical_key, board, score, trace) and keeps additionalProperties:true so the coarse fielded fields (title, company, location, seniority, language) that Phase 12 needs to build a freeze_offer draft WITHOUT re-fetching survive validation.

shortlist_entry.description: One deduped, scope-filtered, deterministically scored offer. Only the four contract keys are required; coarse fielded fields ride alongside (additionalProperties:true) so Phase 12 freezes without re-fetch.

trace.description: Provenance for the entry. Must carry at least source_url so a human can open the original posting.

discovered_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp the scout stamped at per-board write time (never derived from file mtime, never re-fetched). May be an empty string when genuinely unavailable (normalization safe default) -- never a fabricated 'now' timestamp.
